summary: Truth Closure v2: 18 of 20 audit issues addressed across 11 production files. Prior session TRUTH-CLOSURE-V2 applied 16 fixes (secretary events, EVENT_NAME_MAP, STATE_ROLE, state machine transitions, PredicateSpec). This session extended with role-contracts canonical LaneState import, releaseTask idempotency guard, resolveStatus for campaign events, resolveNoBlockingFindings evidence-positive, repair_budget_exhausted resolver, applyEvidenceToBinder, and scoping added to LaneState. Remaining: zero campaign tests, two predicate engines (acknowledged migration debt), integrator lossy Binder consumption (deferred to integration milestone).
